chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Generosity and Munificence

text: 1719 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «اَلْمُنْجِيَاتُ إِطْعَامُ اَلطَّعَامِ وَ إِفْشَاءُ اَلسَّلاَمِ وَ اَلصَّلاَةُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ اَلنَّاسُ نِيَامٌ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1719 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The acts that bring salvation are feeding the hungry, spreading peace, and praying at night while people are asleep."
